field.label: Enable
field.help: Enable traffic sniffing to recover the destination domain from intercepted connections.

field.label: Force DNS Mapping
field.help: Force replace destination IP with sniffed domain.

field.label: Parse Pure IP
field.help: Run sniffer even when the destination has no associated domain.

field.label: Override Destination
field.help: Use sniffed domain to override the original destination.

field.label: Sniff HTTP Ports
field.help: Comma-separated ports / ranges to sniff for HTTP traffic.

field.label: Sniff TLS Ports
field.help: Comma-separated ports / ranges to sniff for TLS SNI.

field.label: Sniff QUIC Ports
field.help: Comma-separated ports / ranges to sniff for QUIC SNI.

field.label: Skip Domains
field.help: Comma-separated domain patterns excluded from sniffing.
